docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED JUN-09-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MULBERRYS CLEANERS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-27-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHRIS WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MULBERRYS CLEANERS IS NOT PRESENT. COURT VOIR DIRES PLAINTIFF REGARDING HIS PROOF OF SERVICES. COURT DEEMS THE FILED PROOF OF SERVICES AS IMPROPER. THE PROPER AGENT OF SERVICE IS NOT SERVED. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2022 - CONTINUED THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-21-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHRIS WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MULBERRYS CLEANERS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CHRIST WONG WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WONG, CHRIS AS TO DEFENDANT MULBERRYS CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CHRIS WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MULBERRYS CLEANERS IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, CHRIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MULBERRYS CLEANERS $1,520.00 PRINCIPAL, $164.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,684.50, THE CHECK #20196 DATED APRIL 20, 2022 WAS TORN UP BY PLAINTIFF PER COURT ORDER. THE COURT AWARDS $1520.00 TO INCLUDE CREDITS AND THE ORIGINAL CHECK ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FOR DAMAGED CLOTHES AND LOST ITEMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $89.50) SERVED JUL-28-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MULBERRYS CLEANERS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MULBERRYS CLEANERS
ORDER TO CONTINUE PLAINTIFF WILL NOT ALLOWED CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
